label: workflow_run hands off at a guidance step and the model continues manually
query: Run the saved workflow with id eval-prepare-then-finish using the workflow_run tool (it takes no arguments). Follow any instructions the workflow gives you, then reply with one line confirming you are done.
notes: Proves the handoff contract: deterministic tool steps run inside workflow_run, execution stops at the guidance step, and the model continues manually from the returned remaining-steps context (a follow-up file_write).

seedWorkflows.name: prepare_then_finish
seedWorkflows.description: Writes a start marker file, then asks the calling model to finish the task manually.
seedWorkflows.triggerText: prepare the workspace then finish manually

steps.text: Now create a file named done.txt containing exactly the word: done. Use the file_write tool.
